name: BA Subscription Expiry Report
query: select bs.buyer as "Buyer:Link/BA Portal Buyer:180", bs.plan as "Plan:Link/BA Subscription Plan:150", bs.end_date as "End Date:Date:110", bs.status as "Status:Data:100", datediff(bs.end_date, curdate()) as "Days Remaining:Int:120" from `tabBA Buyer Subscription` bs where bs.status in ('Active','Trial') and bs.end_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval 30 day) order by bs.end_date asc
